name: Spaghetti Bolognese
instructions: Cook pasta. Brown minced beef add tomato sauce simmer 20 min. Serve over pasta.

name: Chicken Stir-Fry
instructions: Slice chicken. Stir-fry with vegetables and soy sauce for 10-12 min. Serve with rice.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Simple and nutritious breakfast or snack.
instructions: Toast bread. Mash avocado with lemon juice. Spread on toast season to taste.

name: Greek Salad
instructions: Chop vegetables. Combine with olives and feta. Drizzle with olive oil and oregano.

name: Vegetable Curry
instructions: Saute onion and garlic. Add curry paste chickpeas vegetables and coconut milk. Simmer 20 min.

name: Pancakes
instructions: Mix flour egg milk into batter. Cook on pan until bubbles form flip cook 1 more minute.

name: Grilled Salmon
description: Simple and healthy grilled salmon fillet.
instructions: Season salmon. Grill 4 min each side. Serve with lemon and steamed vegetables.

name: Tomato Soup
instructions: Saute onion add canned tomatoes and broth. Simmer 15 min blend until smooth add cream.

name: Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs. Pour into hot pan. Add fillings on one half fold over. Cook 1 more minute.

name: Bean Tacos
description: Quick vegetarian tacos with black beans.
instructions: Heat beans with cumin and chili. Warm tortillas. Assemble with toppings.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic homemade pizza with tomato and mozzarella.
instructions: Roll out dough. Spread tomato sauce. Add mozzarella. Bake at 220C for 15 min.

name: Lentil Soup
instructions: Saute onion and garlic. Add lentils and broth. Simmer 25 min until soft. Season to taste.
